linkSafety.title: Open external link
linkSafety.warning: You're about to leave reef and open an external link. Check the destination below before you continue.

common.addLabelPlaceholder: Add a label and press Enter…

workspace.prompt: Pick a workspace in <link>Settings</link> to get started.

workspace.switchError: Couldn't switch workspace. Please try again.

accessDenied.title: You don't have access to this workspace
accessDenied.body: You're not a member of "{vault}", or it no longer exists. Open one of your workspaces instead.
accessDenied.empty: You don't have any reef workspaces yet.

detach.label: Remove reef from this workspace
detach.blurb: Deletes all reef issues, planning, activity, comments, and templates. The akb vault and any documents that aren't part of reef stay untouched.
detach.confirmDescription: This deletes reef's issues, planning, activity, comments, and templates from this workspace. You can set reef up here again later.
detach.stays2: Any documents and files that aren't part of reef
detach.failed: Couldn't remove reef from the workspace.

delete.label: Delete this workspace
delete.blurb: Permanently deletes the entire vault — every document, file, and its history, including content that isn't part of reef. This can't be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: This permanently deletes the entire vault, including documents and files that aren't part of reef. It can't be undone.
delete.removes1: All reef issues, sprints, milestones, and releases
delete.removes3: Every akb document, file, and the vault's history

language.heading: Language
language.description: Choose the language reef's interface uses on this device. The selection persists per device.

appearance.heading: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how reef looks in this browser. The selection persists per device.

activeWorkspace.heading: Active Workspace
activeWorkspace.description: The akb workspace reef reads and writes issues in. This choice is personal — it's stored on your device and only changes your own view. It scopes the workspace settings below.

ai.notConfiguredHelp: This deployment needs an OpenRouter API key before AI features are available.

authoringLanguage.noVault: Choose a workspace above before configuring the authoring language.
authoringLanguage.label: Default authoring language
authoringLanguage.description: The language AI writes new issue and content drafts in, so the team's generated content stays consistent. Leave unset to let AI follow each request. Existing issues are not changed.

project.label: Project Prefix
project.noVault: Choose a workspace above before configuring the project prefix.
project.description: Used to generate issue IDs like {prefix}-001. Stored in the vault's document so the whole team shares one prefix.

repos.heading: Monitored Code Repositories
repos.description: GitHub repos reef watches for activity (PRs, commits). Stored in the active workspace's table — shared with your whole team.

resolvedAutoHide.label: Completed issues
resolvedAutoHide.noVault: Choose a workspace above before configuring completed issue visibility.
resolvedAutoHide.description: Controls when resolved issues leave the default board and list.

activityScanning.label: AI activity scanning
activityScanning.description: When on, reef scans your monitored repositories and proposes issue drafts and status changes in the activity inbox. Off by default.
activityScanning.noVault: Choose a workspace above before configuring AI activity scanning.
activityScanning.saveError: Couldn't save the AI scanning setting.

members.removeDescription: They'll lose access to this workspace's issues. You can add them back anytime.

misc.connectGithubFirst: Connect GitHub first to load repositories.
misc.workspacesLoadError: Couldn't load your workspaces. Try signing out and back in.
misc.upToDateBody: This workspace runs the current AI playbooks.
misc.updateAvailableBody: Your workspace agents are still following an older playbook. Updating brings them to this release's behavior.
misc.updateError: Couldn't update the workspace instructions. Please try again.
misc.needsWriteAccess: A workspace member with edit access can apply this update.
misc.confirmReplace: This replaces the workspace skill docs for everyone and overwrites manual edits.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Managed by the server operator — read-only here.

preferences.title: Your preferences
preferences.description: Stored in this browser only - for you.

members.title: Members
members.description: People with access to this workspace and their roles. Admins can add members and change their roles.
members.noVault: Select a workspace to manage its members.

general.title: General
general.description: Shared with everyone in the selected workspace. Members with write access can change these; readers see them read-only.

templates.shared: Issue templates are shared with everyone using this workspace.
templates.noVault: Choose a workspace above before defining issue templates.
templates.emptyReadOnly: No issue templates in this workspace yet.
templates.emptyPromptSuffix: to add one, or start with the six defaults (Epic, Story, Task, Bug, Spike, Chore).
templates.name: Name
templates.label: Label
templates.descriptionHint: One-line hint shown under the label.
templates.nameInvalid: Name must be lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.
templates.nameTaken: A template named "{name}" already exists. Edit it or pick a different name.
templates.deleteConfirm: Delete template "{label}"? This removes it from the shared workspace.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidIssueId: Invalid issue id. Expected format: PREFIX-NUMBER.
errors.workspaceOwnerRequired: Only the workspace owner can do that.
errors.githubAppUnconfigured: GitHub App is not configured for this deployment.
errors.suggestionAlreadyReviewed: This suggestion has already been reviewed.
errors.suggestionDraftRequiresCreate: Draft suggestions require a create proposal update.
errors.suggestionStatusRequiresUpdate: Status-change suggestions require an update proposal or rationale update.
errors.suggestionCannotRetarget: Status-change suggestions cannot retarget the issue.
errors.requestBodyInvalid: Request body is missing or invalid
errors.vaultHeaderInvalid: X-Reef-Vault header is missing or invalid
errors.workspaceSessionInvalid: Workspace session is missing or invalid
errors.aiUnavailableDeployment: AI service is unavailable for this deployment. Please contact an administrator.
errors.enrichDeploymentUnavailable: AI service is unavailable for this deployment. You can still save the issue without it.
errors.enrichUnavailable: AI enrichment is unavailable. You can still save the issue without it.

agent.runRequestInvalid: Agent run request is missing or invalid.
agent.workspaceAuthRequired: Workspace session is missing or invalid.
agent.workspaceUnavailable: Workspace backend is unavailable. Please try again.
agent.vaultRequired: X-Reef-Vault header is missing or invalid.
agent.githubCredentialUnavailable: GitHub App credentials are unavailable. Check the deployment GitHub App configuration.
agent.artifactIdMismatch: Artifact id does not match the request path.
agent.artifactEditRequestInvalid: Artifact edit request is missing or invalid.
agent.artifactEditMissingVault: Artifact edit requires a vault for persisted activity suggestions.
agent.artifactEditInvalid: Artifact edit produced an invalid artifact.
agent.artifactApprovalRequestInvalid: Artifact approval request is missing or invalid.
agent.artifactApprovalMissingArtifact: Artifact approval requires an artifact payload.
agent.artifactDismissalRequestInvalid: Artifact dismissal request is missing or invalid.
agent.artifactDismissalMissingArtifact: Artifact dismissal requires an artifact payload.
agent.artifactDismissalMissingVault: Artifact dismissal requires a vault for persisted activity suggestions.
agent.artifactTypeNotApprovable: This artifact type does not define a server-side approval mutation.
agent.artifactAlreadyReviewed: This artifact has already been reviewed.
agent.statusChangeRetargetForbidden: Status-change artifacts cannot retarget the issue.
agent.closeRequiresReason: Closing an issue requires a reason. Close it from the issue close dialog instead.
agent.invalidStatusChangeTarget: Backlog isn't a valid status-change target. Move an issue to the backlog from the issue itself.
agent.activitySuggestionKindMismatch: Artifact type does not match the persisted activity suggestion.
agent.activitySuggestionNotFound: Artifact command could not find the referenced activity suggestion.
agent.activitySuggestionPersisting: The activity suggestion is still being persisted. Retry after the scan completes.
agent.invalidActivitySuggestionId: Artifact metadata contains an invalid activity suggestion id.
agent.artifactAlreadyDismissed: This artifact has already been dismissed.
agent.missingProjectPrefix: Project prefix is required to approve an issue-create artifact.
agent.staleStatusChangeArtifact: This artifact is out of date because the issue status has already changed.

search.title: Search issues
search.description: Quickly jump to an issue by id or title.
search.placeholder: Search issues by ID or title…
search.unavailable: Search is unavailable right now. Try again in a moment.

cards.noOpenWork: No open work in scope — nothing left to forecast.
cards.thinSample: Thin sample — treat these as rough.
cards.foldedNote: Top buckets shown; {folded} folded into an Other bucket.
cards.riskCaption: Open-work issue count by priority (rows) and time since last update (columns).
cards.netChangeOverTime: Issues created, closed, and net change over time
cards.noCompletions: No completions in {period} — not enough history to forecast.

page.noDueDates: No due dates set on open work.
page.noActiveIssues: No active issues yet. Create one to start building reports.
page.noMatchingData: No matching report data. Adjust the report scope to widen the view.

toasts.noNewActivity: No new activity since the last scan.
toasts.scanError: Failed to scan for new activity.
toasts.scanStatusChanges: {count, plural, one {# status change} other {# status changes}}
toasts.issueAddedToBacklogDescription: It won't appear on the default board until you move it to Todo.
toasts.issueCreatedWithDocFailures: Issue {id} created, but {count, plural, one {# linked document} other {# linked documents}} couldn't be attached — add {count, plural, one {it} other {them}} from the issue.
toasts.commentEditError: Couldn't save the edit. Try again.

backlog.noMatches: No backlog issues match your filters.
backlog.emptyDescription: New issues arrive in Todo. Send work you want to defer here to keep it out of the active board.
backlog.reorderHintSwitchToManual: Switch to Manual order to reorder
backlog.updateErrorDescription: The backlog was reverted. Retry to move it again.
backlog.reorderErrorDescription: The order was reverted. Retry to move it again.

detailDialogs.closeReasonDescription: Pick the reason that should be recorded with this closure.
detailDialogs.deleteDescription: The issue file will be removed from the workspace vault. akb's git history is preserved, but the issue won't be reachable from reef. Use <archive>Archive</archive> instead if you might restore it later.

detail.noVaultPrompt: Configure a workspace in <link>{settings}</link> to view this issue.

ai.title: Ask AI

ai.emptyState: Ask about your codebase — file locations, references, how something works.

myWork.emptyTitle: Nothing is assigned to you yet
myWork.emptyDescription: Issues assigned to you show up here, prioritized for what to do next.
myWork.caughtUpDescription: No open work is assigned to you right now.
myWork.noSessionDescription: Sign in to see the work assigned to you.

timeline.loadError: Failed to load some issues. Displaying cached data if available.
timeline.empty: Your timeline is empty. Add start or due dates to begin planning.
timeline.noScheduled: No scheduled issues in this quarter.
timeline.unscheduledHint: Issues without a start date or due date.

login.intro: Sign in with your workspace account to continue.

onboarding.pageSubtitle: Create a project workspace or pick an existing one.
onboarding.newWorkspaceDescription: Create a new akb vault and a reef project prefix.
onboarding.createWorkspaceSubtitle: Start with a new akb vault and a reef project prefix.
onboarding.existingWorkspaceHint: Pick an akb vault that already has a reef config document.
onboarding.authoringLanguageHint: The language AI writes new content in. Leave unset to let AI follow each request; you can change it later in Settings.
